narrative:
Precinct New Russia Twp (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,345 registered voters, with 47.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.3 percentage points.
